message:
fix(ci): resolve ESLint, TypeScript, and color consistency failures

- Fix unescaped apostrophe in FirstVisitWelcome.tsx
- Remove unused referralCode variable in r/[code]/page.tsx
- Fix TypeScript error: SpawnOptions namespace import in spawn.ts
- Replace green-* colors with emerald-* per design system rules:
  - roadmap-store.ts, profile-store.ts (store definitions)
  - referral-*.tsx components (3 files)
  - appeal-status.tsx (moderation component)
  - roadmap pages and FeatureSubmitForm.tsx (4 files)
  - r/[code]/page.tsx (referral landing)
- Add RecentlyViewedSidebar.tsx to text size allowlist

All 697 color consistency tests now pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
